use_codes.desc: USE OF NALOXONE HYDROCHLORIDE FOR EMERGENCY TREATMENT OF KNOWN OR SUSPECTED OPIOID OVERDOSE, AS MANIFESTED BY RESPIRATORY AND/OR CENTRAL NERVOUS SYSTEM DEPRESSION.
